name: apple-mail
description: Access Apple Mail on macOS — search emails, read messages, create drafts, list attachments, and view threads via Mail.app's scripting interface.
long_description:
Connects Claude to Apple Mail on your Mac via Mail.app's native scripting interface. No database access or special permissions needed.

**Features:**
- Search emails by subject, sender, date range, flags, and attachments
- Read full message bodies (plain text and HTML)
- View email threads / conversations
- List and retrieve attachments
- Browse all mailboxes and accounts
- Create draft emails (saved to Drafts with a link to open in Mail.app)

**Requirements:**
- macOS 13 Ventura or later
- Apple Mail running
- Automation permission (macOS prompts automatically on first use)

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get overall mail statistics: total messages, unread count, mailbox count

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes/folders across all accounts with message counts

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails by text, sender, recipient (To/CC), subject, date range, read/flagged status, and attachments

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Read a full email with plain-text body, recipients, and metadata

tools.name: get_email_link
tools.description: Get a message:// URL that opens the email directly in Mail.app

tools.name: get_email_html
tools.description: Get the HTML body of an email

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get all messages in a conversation thread

tools.name: list_email_attachments
tools.description: List all attachments for a specific email

tools.name: get_email_attachment
tools.description: Retrieve an attachment as base64-encoded data

tools.name: create_email_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email in Mail.app and return a message:// link to open it
